comments: Seviranta is an evaluation tool: it tests pages against WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA and the EAA and provides reports plus step-by-step guidance for the developer to fix issues in their own code. It does not automatically modify the user's content or code, and it is not an overlay.
features: Seviranta scans websites and webshops against WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA and the European Accessibility Act. Each issue is reported with its exact location in the code and step-by-step guidance to fix it, plus ongoing monitoring and a compliance record for regulators. Available in 11 languages. Not an overlay.
title: Seviranta
